summary.text: Interface to build a configuration file for YARP

members.name: AddCluster
members.signature: public abstract YarpCluster IYarpConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(EndpointReference endpoint)

summary.text: Add a new cluster to YARP.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the
addClusterFromEndpoint
helper instead.

endpoint.text: The endpoint target for this cluster.

members.name: AddCluster
members.signature: public abstract YarpCluster IYarpConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(IResourceBuilder<IResourceWithServiceDiscovery> resource)

summary.text: Add a new cluster to YARP based on a resource that supports service discovery.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the
addClusterFromResource
helper instead.

resource.text: The resource target for this cluster.

members.name: AddCluster
members.signature: public abstract YarpCluster IYarpConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(IResourceBuilder<ExternalServiceResource> externalService)

summary.text: Add a new cluster to YARP based on an external service resource.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the
addClusterFromExternalService
helper instead.

externalService.text: The external service used by this cluster.

members.name: AddCluster
members.signature: public abstract YarpCluster IYarpConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(string clusterName, object[] destinations)

summary.text: Add a new cluster to YARP based on a collection of urls.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the
addClusterWithDestinations
helper instead.

destinations.text: The destinations used by this cluster.

members.name: AddCluster
members.signature: public virtual YarpCluster IYarpConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(string clusterName, object destination)

summary.text: Add a new cluster to YARP based on a collection of urls.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the
addClusterWithDestination
helper instead.

destination.text: The destinations used by this cluster.

cluster.text: The target cluster for this route.

path.text: The path to match for this route.

summary.text: Provides extension methods for adding YARP resources to the application model.

members.name: AddYarp
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.AddYarp(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string name)

summary.text: Adds a YARP container to the application model.

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

members.name: PublishWithStaticFiles
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.PublishWithStaticFiles(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder, IResourceBuilder<IResourceWithContainerFiles> resourceWithFiles)

summary.text: In publish mode, generates a Dockerfile that copies static files from the specified resource into /app/wwwroot.

members.name: WithConfiguration
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.WithConfiguration(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder, Action<IYarpConfigurationBuilder> configurationBuilder)

summary.text: Configure the YARP resource.

members.name: WithHostHttpsPort
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.WithHostHttpsPort(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder, int? port)

summary.text: Configures the host HTTPS port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port. This will only have effect if an HTTPS endpoint is configured on the YARP resource due to TLS termination being enabled.

port.text: The port to bind on the host. If
is used random port will be assigned.

members.name: WithHostPort
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.WithHostPort(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder, int? port)

summary.text: Configures the host port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

port.text: The port to bind on the host. If
is used random port will be assigned.

members.name: WithStaticFiles
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.WithStaticFiles(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder)

summary.text: Enables static file serving in the YARP resource. Static files are served from the wwwroot folder.

members.name: WithStaticFiles
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> YarpResourceExtensions.WithStaticFiles(this IResourceBuilder<YarpResource> builder, string sourcePath)

summary.text: Enables static file serving. In run mode: bind mounts
to /wwwroot. In publish mode: generates a Dockerfile whose build context is
and copies its contents into /app/wwwroot baked into the image.

sourcePath.text: The source path containing static files to serve.

summary.text: Represents a route for YARP
Provides extension methods for configuring a YARP destination

members.name: WithMatch
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatch(this YarpRoute route, RouteMatch match)

summary.text: Set the parameters used to match requests.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the DTO-based overload or the specific match helper methods instead.

members.name: WithMatchHeaders
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatchHeaders(this YarpRoute route, params RouteHeader[] headers)

summary.text: Only match requests that contain all of these headers.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the DTO-based overload instead.

members.name: WithMatchHosts
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatchHosts(this YarpRoute route, params string[] hosts)

summary.text: Only match requests with the given Host header. Supports wildcards and ports. For unicode host names, do not use punycode.

members.name: WithMatchMethods
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatchMethods(this YarpRoute route, params string[] methods)

summary.text: Only match requests that use these optional HTTP methods. E.g. GET, POST.

members.name: WithMatchPath
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatchPath(this YarpRoute route, string path)

summary.text: Only match requests with the given Path pattern.

members.name: WithMatchRouteQueryParameter
members.signature: public static YarpRoute YarpRouteExtensions.WithMatchRouteQueryParameter(this YarpRoute route, params RouteQueryParameter[] queryParameters)

summary.text: Only match requests that contain all of these query parameters.

remarks.text: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the DTO-based overload instead.

or the transform-specific helpers instead.

members.signature: public static YarpRoute PathTransformExtensions.WithTransformPathSet(this YarpRoute route, PathString path)

summary.text: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying request headers to the proxy request.

members.signature: public static YarpRoute RequestHeadersTransformExtensions.WithTransformRequestHeader(this YarpRoute route, string headerName, string value, bool append = true)

members.signature: public static YarpRoute RequestHeadersTransformExtensions.WithTransformRequestHeaderRemove(this YarpRoute route, string headerName)

members.name: WithTransformRequestHeadersAllowed
members.signature: public static YarpRoute RequestHeadersTransformExtensions.WithTransformRequestHeadersAllowed(this YarpRoute route, params string[] allowedHeaders)

summary.text: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed request headers. Other transforms that modify or append to existing headers may be affected if not included in the allow list.

summary.text: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed response headers. Other transforms that modify or append to existing headers may be affected if not included in the allow list.

members.signature: public static YarpRoute ResponseTransformExtensions.WithTransformResponseTrailer(this YarpRoute route, string headerName, string value, bool append = true, ResponseCondition condition = ResponseCondition.Success)
